name: Crock Pot Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dried navy beans, rinsed, soaked overnight
1/4 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
1 onion peeled and cut in half, stuffed with 4 cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans and water in the slow cooker; cover and cook on low heat for 7 hours until tender.
2. Drain the beans; refrigerate in the pot. The dish can be cooked up to 3 days in advance.
3. In a small bowl, stir together molasses, coffee, sugar, vinegar, mustard, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir the mixture into the beans in the pot.
5. Add onion and Canadian bacon, pushing them down into the beans.
6. Cover and cook on low heat for 7 more hours, or until the beans are flavored through.
